title: Sales Order Event
description: A sales order lifecycle event from Aurora MySQL. Tracks order creation, fulfillment, and payment.

order_id.description: Unique identifier for the sales order.

event_ts.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when this event occurred.

order_amount.description: Total dollar amount of the order.

status.description: Current lifecycle status of the sales order.

promotion_id.description: Promotion applied to this order, if any.

brand_tier.description: Product brand tier for revenue-mix analysis.

appointment_id.description: Linked appointment ID for conversion tracking.
